daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic today, Aries. The universe is basically handing you permission to trust your gut and move boldly. Channel that fire—people are drawn to your authenticity right now.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, your energy is irresistible. If you've been holding back a conversation, today's the day. Vulnerability hits different when you own it completely.
daily.career: Your ideas have serious momentum. Don't second-guess yourself—that instinct to speak up or pivot? That's your superpower talking. Trust the direction you're being pulled toward.
daily.health: Your body's telling you it needs movement and lightness today. Whether that's a walk, stretching, or dancing in your room, listen to that restless energy. It's asking for flow.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, bringing clarity to situations that felt foggy before. You're stepping into your power moment—trust the momentum building around you. This is about aligned action, not forcing anything.
weekly.love: Vulnerability is your superpower rn. If you've been holding back, the cosmic energy says it's safe to show up more authentically. Whether single or coupled, deeper connections are forming through honest conversations.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. Leadership energy is strong, and people are actually listening. Channel that fire into projects that excite you—your enthusiasm is contagious and others can feel it.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement and intentional rest in equal measure. This isn't about grinding; it's about honoring what energizes you. Notice what activities make you feel most like yourself and lean into those.
